diagnosis: The level is a short, flat corridor with two elevated platform islands and a single fast 'moth' enemy on the left island. The player completed it in 19 seconds with 2 deaths, both at the same spot (x≈70, y≈420) from combat with that enemy. The trace shows the player waited ~3 seconds at spawn, then moved right, climbed onto the left platform, engaged the enemy, fell twice, then proceeded unimpeded across the rest of the level. The right platform island and exit required no meaningful interaction. The sole challenge was an overtuned enemy speed on an otherwise featureless horizontal stretch.

lessons.lesson: A single overtuned enemy on flat terrain cannot carry a level's challenge; without spatial variety (verticality, cover, chokepoints) the encounter feels unfair rather than engaging, and the rest of the level becomes a walk simulator.
conditions: level is predominantly flat horizontal corridor
enemy speed exceeds player reaction/projectile capability on flat ground
no vertical traversal, cover, or structural breaks near enemy
lessons.outcome: player dies repeatedly at same spot, rates level 2/5, rest of level traversed without engagement
